chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1152 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4664/25 3.For hearing of main case 17-09-2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
